violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (kitchen (upstairs) ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
The (ceilings ) in the (food storage area ) area is in poor repair.Observed chipping paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings on the food storage shelves in back storage area, pipes, and equipment shelve under prep table ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC to wash and sanitize all areas and equipment where droppings were observed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (storage room) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
Milk Cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The (ceilings ) in the (kitchen and food storage area ) area is in poor repair. Observed paint peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (food storage ) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The ceiling in the food storage and kitchen area is in poor repair. The ceiling was observed with peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the food storage area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023
The floor throughout the kitchen area is in poor repair. Several areas observed with exposed cement. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The ceiling in the food storage area is in poor repair. The ceiling was observed with peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

The floor in the food storage area, under shelving, has an accumulation of soil dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023
